query:
ALTER TABLE `student_profiles` 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `current_university_id` INT AFTER `current_university`,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `current_major_id` INT AFTER `current_major`,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `target_university_ids` TEXT AFTER `target_universities`,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `target_major_ids` TEXT AFTER `target_majors`;
